# btp_subaccount_role_collection_role (List Resource)

This list resource allows you to discover all roles within the given role collection in the given subaccount.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This feature requires Terraform v1.14.0 or later (Stable as of 2026)
# List resources must be defined in .tfquery.hcl files.

# Generic template for a list block
list "btp_subaccount_role_collection_role" "<label_name>" {
  # (Required) Provider instance to use
  provider = provider_name

   config {
    # Provider specific filters
  }
}

# List block to discover all roles within a collection for given subaccount
# Returns only the resource identities by default.
list "btp_subaccount_role_collection_role" "all" {
  provider = btp

  # Required
  config {
    subaccount_id = "<subaccount_id>"
    name          = "<name>"
  }
}

# List block to discover all roles within a collection for a given subaccount with full resource details
# Setting include_resource = true returns full resource objects (e.g., role_name, name..)
list "btp_subaccount_role_collection_role" "with_resource" {
  provider         = btp
  include_resource = true

  config {
  # Required  
  subaccount_id = "<subaccount_id>"
  name          = "<name>"

  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The Name of the role collection.
- `subaccount_id` (String) The ID of the subaccount.
